heading: University-based Centers for Research on Aviation Training
label: 40116 University-based Centers for Research on Aviation Training
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40116.42 U.S.C. 16727, , ; , , .Pub. L. 109–155, title IV, § 427119 Stat. 2926Pub. L. 110–422, title III, § 308122 Stat. 4788Dec. 30, 2005Oct. 15, 2008In subsection (b), the words “Centers for Research on Aviation Training” are substituted for “Centers” for clarity. There are references to both “Centers for Research on Aviation Training” and “Administration Centers” in subsection (a).In subsection (d)(1), the words “proposed in the application submitted under subsection (c)” are substituted for “proposed by the Center in its application under subsection (c)” for clarity. Under section (c), applications are filed by an institution of higher education (or a consortium of such institutions) seeking funding, and not by the Center for which such funding is sought.

There are references to both “Centers for Research on Aviation Training” and “Administration Centers” in subsection (a).In subsection (d)(1), the words “proposed in the application submitted under subsection (c)” are substituted for “proposed by the Center in its application under subsection (c)” for clarity. Under section (c), applications are filed by an institution of higher education (or a consortium of such institutions) seeking funding, and not by the Center for which such funding is sought.

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Administrator shall award grants to institutions of higher education (or consortia thereof) to establish one or more Centers for Research on Aviation Training under cooperative agreements with appropriate Administration Centers.

children.heading: .—Purpose
children.label: b .—Purpose
children.text: The purpose of the Centers for Research on Aviation Training shall be to investigate the impact of new technologies and procedures, particularly those related to the aircraft flight deck and to the air traffic management functions, on training requirements for pilots and air traffic controllers.

children.heading: .—Application
children.label: c .—Application
children.text: An institution of higher education (or a consortium of such institutions) seeking funding under this section shall submit an application to the Administrator at such time, in such manner, and containing such information as the Administrator may require, including, at a minimum, a 5-year research plan.
satisfactory performance in meeting the goals of the research plan proposed in the application submitted under subsection (c); and
other requirements as specified by the Administrator.
